---
title: "Narrative of an expedition to the Zambesi and its tributaries and of the discovery of the lakes Shirwa and Nyassa, 1858-1864"
---

## Narrative of an expedition to the Zambesi and its tributaries and of the discovery of the lakes Shirwa and Nyassa, 1858-1864

**Author:** Dr David Livingstone
**Date:** 1865
**Imprint:** London: Murray

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
